name: ADC Telecommunications, Inc.
description: ADC Telecommunications, Inc. was a provider of broadband connection equipment, software, and integration services for telecommunications, cable television, wireless, and enterprise networks worldwide. Founded in 1935 as Magnetic Products Company, the company designed and manufactured fiber-optic, copper, and wireless network infrastructure solutions. ADC Telecommunications was acquired by Tyco Electronics (now TE Connectivity) in December 2010, integrating its portfolio into TE's network solutions segment.
